source_jobs.title: Senior AI Product Manager (Builder)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT BRANDLIGHT

Brandlight is the leading enterprise AI visibility platform, built to help the world’s leading brands understand, manage, and optimize how they appear across AI-driven search, commerce, and advertising.

As AI rapidly becomes a trillion-dollar marketing and distribution channel, Brandlight is defining the systems that decide what brands are surfaced, trusted, and chosen.

Join our team and help build the next generation of tools shaping the future of brand management in an AI-first world.


ABOUT THE ROLE

As a Senior AI Product Manager at Brandlight you thrive at the intersection of product innovation and execution velocity: someone who deeply understands customer problems, forms an opinionated view of what to build, and then drives it all the way to shipped, adopted product that moves business metrics.

This is a single-threaded ownership role. You won't be handed a roadmap. You'll build one, grounded in customer evidence and strategic judgment, then own every step from problem framing through launch and measurement. You'll work directly with leadership, engineering, and GTM in a fast-moving, resource-constrained environment where every decision carries real weight. The right person for this role has built products from ambiguity before, has the conviction to say no to 90% of requests, and has a track record of shipping things that customers didn't know they needed but can't live without


RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Own product strategy and execution for a core domain end to end, from identifying the right problems through shipped, adopted product

 - Go deep on customers, competitors, and market dynamics; translate what you learn into product bets backed by evidence, not opinion

 - Make the hard prioritization calls and build a transparent system the whole company trusts for deciding what gets built and what doesn't

 - Drive delivery with speed and precision: tight specs, aggressive scoping, fast cycles, zero ambiguity

 - Validate before you build; design fast research cycles and kill your own ideas when the data says so

 - Tie every initiative to a business metric with a measurement plan before development begins; own the full loop through post-launch impact

 - Keep the CEO, R&D, and GTM aligned with clear communication and crisp decisions

 - Build repeatable systems for customer research, competitive intelligence, and internal feedback loops


REQUIREMENTS

 - 8+ years in product management, including 2–3+ years as a senior/lead PM in B2B

 - Proven end-to-end ownership: discovery → shipped product with business impact

 - Strong product sense and customer empathy; focuses on outcomes, not features

 - Excellent prioritization; identifies high-impact work and makes clear tradeoffs

 - Ships fast; drives teams to high output through focused execution

 - Strong technical fluency (architecture, data, AI/ML); works closely with R&D

 - Clear communicator; writes sharp specs and keeps teams aligned

 - Curious and self-driven; learns fast and owns execution end-to-end


WHY JOIN US?

At Brandlight, you’ll build and shape a new category at the intersection of AI, marketing, and commerce.

We’re a fast-growing startup led by repeat entrepreneurs, world-class engineers, and marketing leaders, all driven to reinvent how brands are built, discovered, and chosen in the age of AI.

source_jobs.title: Senior DevOps Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT BRANDLIGHT

Brandlight is the leading enterprise AI visibility platform, built to help the world’s leading brands understand, manage, and optimize how they appear across AI-driven search, commerce, and advertising.

As AI rapidly becomes a trillion-dollar marketing and distribution channel, Brandlight is defining the systems that decide what brands are surfaced, trusted, and chosen.

Join our team and help build the next generation of tools shaping the future of brand management in an AI-first world.


ABOUT THE ROLE

As a Senior DevOps Engineer at Brandlight, you’ll build and scale the cloud-native platform behind an AI-native analytics product processing millions of inference requests across multiple LLM providers.

This is a role for someone that can own infrastructure projects end-to-end from Kubernetes and CI/CD to observability and security, while improving developer velocity and reliability at scale.


RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Build and scale production Kubernetes infrastructure for AI workloads

 - Own CI/CD standards and delivery pipelines across teams

 - Improve reliability, observability, and incident response at scale

 - Implement secure, scalable IaC foundations (Terraform/Crossplane)

 - Build internal tooling and self-service workflows to improve DevEx

 - Drive cloud architecture decisions across availability, performance, and cost


REQUIREMENTS

 - 6+ years in Platform Engineering, DevOps, or SRE roles

 - Strong cloud experience (GCP preferred) with Kubernetes at scale

 - Production Kubernetes expertise: HPA, Helm, ArgoCD, Keda, secrets management

 - Strong IaC foundations with Terraform and/or Crossplane

 - CI/CD ownership experience (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or similar)

 - Strong scripting/programming skills (Python, Go, or Bash), automation-first mindset

 - Experience improving developer experience via internal platforms or tooling

 - Clear communicator who documents decisions, owns outcomes, and drives execution

Advantages

 - GPU / ML infrastructure experience, scaling compute for AI workloads

 - OpenTelemetry and observability at scale (Datadog preferred), distributed tracing, metrics, and monitoring

 - FinOps mindset - cost visibility, rightsizing, and commitment management


WHY JOIN US?

At Brandlight, you’ll build and shape a new category at the intersection of AI, marketing, and commerce.

We’re a fast-growing startup led by repeat entrepreneurs, world-class engineers, and marketing leaders, all driven to reinvent how brands are built, discovered, and chosen in the age of AI.

source_jobs.title: AI Strategist
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT BRANDLIGHT

Brandlight is the leading enterprise AI visibility platform, built to help the world’s leading brands understand, manage, and optimize how they appear across AI-driven search, commerce, and advertising.

As AI rapidly becomes a trillion-dollar marketing and distribution channel, Brandlight is defining the systems that decide what brands are surfaced, trusted, and chosen.

Join our team and help build the next generation of tools shaping the future of brand management in an AI-first world.


ABOUT THE ROLE

As a Senior SEO & AI Search Strategist at Brandlight, you’ll be a hands-on expert and trusted advisor helping enterprise brands win across both traditional SEO and the new era of AI-driven search. You’ll blend sharp strategy with real execution, engage confidently with Fortune 500 marketing leadership, and translate Brandlight insights into measurable business impact.

This is a role for someone with deep domain mastery, strong presence, and a builder mindset who thrives at the frontier of search.


RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Lead enterprise customers to measurable outcomes across SEO & AI search

 - Build clear strategies and tactical plans customers can execute fast

 - Serve as a trusted expert to both VPs and hands-on practitioners

 - Turn product insights into high-impact use cases and adoption

 - Create compelling narratives that increase buy-in and retention

 - Partner with Product + R&D to shape features and customer value


REQUIREMENTS

 - 7+ years of SEO experience, with hands-on execution in enterprise environments

 - Deep mastery of SEO strategy, technical SEO, content systems, and performance measurement

 - Strong understanding of AI-driven search and how brands win in generative discovery

 - Trusted domain expert that holds the room, adapts quickly, and leads with confidence under pressure

 - Clear grasp of enterprise marketing value and what matters to senior decision-makers

 - Strong executive presence, crisp communication, and advisor-level credibility

 - Autodidact mindset: curious, sharp, and constantly experimenting at the frontier

 - High ownership, hunger to win, and excellent cross-functional collaboration

Advantage

 - GEO / AEO experience


WHY JOIN US?

At Brandlight, you’ll build and shape a new category at the intersection of AI, marketing, and commerce.

We’re a fast-growing startup led by repeat entrepreneurs, world-class engineers, and marketing leaders, all driven to reinvent how brands are built, discovered, and chosen in the age of AI.

source_jobs.title: Senior Backend Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT BRANDLIGHT

Brandlight is the leading enterprise AI visibility platform, built to help the world’s leading brands understand, manage, and optimize how they appear across AI-driven search, commerce, and advertising.

As AI rapidly becomes a trillion-dollar marketing and distribution channel, Brandlight is defining the systems that decide how brands are surfaced, trusted, and chosen.

Join our team and help build the next generation of tools shaping the future of brand management in an AI-first world.


ABOUT THE ROLE

As a Senior Backend Engineer at Brandlight, you’ll be a core builder with a strong infrastructure mindset, responsible for designing and delivering backend systems that can support several billion data points collected daily, with high reliability and real-time visibility.

This role is for someone who can own complex systems end-to-end, move fast, build from scratch, automate everything possible, and create production-grade infrastructure that scales.


RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Build and own backend infrastructure handling billions of data points daily

 - Design scalable services with reliability, automation, and observability

 - Enable daily monitoring at scale with strong SLAs

 - Build parallel execution systems to cut processing and report times

 - Deliver real-time monitoring and alerting for system and data health

 - Reduce manual work through automation, tooling, and processes

 - Own delivery end-to-end: architecture → production → performance


REQUIREMENTS

 - 7+ years building production systems at scale

 - 7+ years Python, writing clean, maintainable backend code

 - Built infrastructure from scratch, owning it end-to-end

 - Shipped backend products independently, from design to production

 - Experience with high-throughput data collection + monitoring systems

 - Automation-first mindset: reduces manual work with tools and processes.

 - Strong communicator and execution driver across teams

 - Curious, low-ego, autodidact, with proven leadership


WHY JOIN US?

At Brandlight, you’ll build and shape a new category at the intersection of AI, marketing, and commerce.

We’re a fast-growing startup led by repeat entrepreneurs, world-class engineers, and marketing leaders, all driven to reinvent how brands are built, discovered, and chosen in the age of AI.

source_jobs.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT BRANDLIGHT

Brandlight is the leading enterprise AI visibility platform, built to help the world’s leading brands understand, manage, and optimize how they appear across AI-driven search, commerce, and advertising.

As AI rapidly becomes a trillion-dollar marketing and distribution channel, Brandlight is defining the systems that decide what brands are surfaced, trusted, and chosen.

Join our team and help build the next generation of tools shaping the future of brand management in an AI-first world.


ABOUT THE ROLE

As a Senior Full Stack Engineer at Brandlight, you’ll be a core builder owning high-impact product modules end-to-end from design to production, in a hyper-growth environment. You’ll lead architecture and performance for data-heavy experiences used by Fortune 500 marketing teams, delivering beautiful, scalable systems at extreme speed.

This role is for someone who naturally becomes the main driver, turning ambiguity into production-ready execution.


RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Build end-to-end product modules (frontend, backend, APIs, infra)

 - Own architecture and delivery from design to production

 - Build data-heavy systems supporting billions of rows and fast UX

 - Drive sub-400ms performance via full-stack latency optimization

 - Create reusable React components and shared frontend patterns

 - Partner with Product & Design to deliver pixel-perfect features

 - Lead by example through ownership, execution, and mentorship


REQUIREMENTS

 - 7+ years of software engineering experience in production systems

 - Senior Full Stack background in hyper-growth startup environments

 - Strong React + TypeScript expertise and scalable frontend architecture

 - Strong Node.js backend experience (APIs, services, data flows)

 - Proven ability to ship end-to-end features independently

 - Deep performance mindset: caching, queries, rendering, network

 - Fast, pixel-perfect execution with high ownership and low ego


WHY JOIN US?

At Brandlight, you’ll build and shape a new category at the intersection of AI, marketing, and commerce.

We’re a fast-growing startup led by repeat entrepreneurs, world-class engineers, and marketing leaders, all driven to reinvent how brands are built, discovered, and chosen in the age of AI.

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Sales Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT BRANDLIGHT

Brandlight is the leading enterprise AI visibility platform, built to help the world’s leading brands understand, manage, and optimize how they appear across AI-driven search, commerce, and advertising.

As AI rapidly becomes a trillion-dollar marketing and distribution channel, Brandlight is defining the systems that decide how brands are surfaced, trusted, and chosen.

Join our team and help build the next generation of tools shaping the future of brand management in an AI-first world.


ABOUT THE ROLE

As an Enterprise Account Executive at Brandlight, you will own and manage complex enterprise sales cycles end-to-end, working with stakeholders ranging from CMO-level executives to hands-on practitioners. You’ll develop a strong understanding of AI Search, build credibility quickly, and guide customers through thoughtful discovery, clear value framing, and disciplined deal execution.

This role is suited for an experienced enterprise seller who is comfortable operating independently, managing multiple stakeholders, and closing high-value deals in a consultative manner.

Salary Range: $170,000 - $225,000 a year


RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Own the full enterprise sales cycle from discovery through close

 - Lead consultative sales conversations across executive and practitioner audiences

 - Build clear business cases tied to customer value, urgency, and ROI

 - Manage multi-threaded deal processes, including procurement and close planning

 - Partner with Product and Customer Success to support onboarding and future expansion

 - Maintain accurate pipeline management, forecasting, and deal documentation


REQUIREMENTS

 - 7+ years of enterprise sales experience as an individual contributor, owning deals end-to-end

 - Demonstrated ability to consistently close complex, high-value enterprise deals

 - Strong capability to identify customer needs and clearly articulate business value

 - Experience selling to Fortune 500 marketing leadership (CMO / VP level)

 - Consultative and adaptable selling style; able to operate without rigid playbooks

 - Strong executive communication skills and a credible, trusted-advisor presence

 - Solid understanding of product value with structured, analytical deal thinking

 - Highly organized and disciplined in pipeline management and follow-through

 - Collaborative mindset with a focus on company-wide success


WHY JOIN US

At Brandlight, you’ll build and shape a new category at the intersection of AI, marketing, and commerce.

We’re a fast-growing startup led by repeat entrepreneurs, world-class engineers, and marketing leaders, all driven to reinvent how brands are built, discovered, and chosen in the age of AI.

source_jobs.title: Senior Enterprise Account Lead (Senior Customer Success)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT BRANDLIGHT

Brandlight is the leading enterprise AI visibility platform, built to help the world’s leading brands understand, manage, and optimize how they appear across AI-driven search, commerce, and advertising.

As AI rapidly becomes a trillion-dollar marketing and distribution channel, Brandlight is defining the systems that decide how brands are surfaced, trusted, and chosen.

Join our team and help build the next generation of tools shaping the future of brand management in an AI-first world.


ABOUT THE ROLE

As a Senior Enterprise Account Lead (Senior Customer Success) at Brandlight, you will own a portfolio of strategic enterprise customers from onboarding through renewal and expansion. You’ll be responsible for building senior-level relationships, ensuring strong adoption, and translating product value into measurable business outcomes.

This is a role for someone who is comfortable leading complex, multi-stakeholder accounts. You bring strong commercial instincts, solid product understanding, and the ability to operate confidently with executive teams while staying deeply connected to day-to-day execution.

Salary Range: $150,000 - $180,000 a year


RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Own enterprise accounts end-to-end, from onboarding to renewal and expansion

 - Lead onboarding and adoption to ensure customers realize value quickly and consistently

 - Build and maintain strong relationships with senior stakeholders (VP+), including economic buyers

 - Drive renewals and expansions through clear value articulation and consultative engagement

 - Identify risks, opportunities, and leverage points across each account

 - Surface customer insights that inform product direction, positioning, process, and pricing.

 - Partner closely with Product, Sales, and R&D to deliver customer outcomes


REQUIREMENTS

 - 7+ years of experience managing enterprise accounts, with ownership of renewals and expansions

 - Experience working directly with Fortune 500 marketing leadership (CMO / VP level)

 - Strong ability to understand customer business objectives and clearly articulate product value

 - Comfortable leading conversations as the domain expert, even when challenged with new information

 - Consultative and adaptable; able to operate effectively without rigid playbooks

 - Strong executive communication skills and a trusted-advisor presence

 - Solid understanding of product and strong analytical judgment

 - Highly organized, dependable, and consistent in execution

 - Strong sense of ownership with reliable follow-through


WHY JOIN US

At Brandlight, you’ll build and shape a new category at the intersection of AI, marketing, and commerce.

We’re a fast-growing startup led by repeat entrepreneurs, world-class engineers, and marketing leaders, all driven to reinvent how brands are built, discovered, and chosen in the age of AI.
